title: Suzanne McCarthy reappointed to the GLAA board
body: "This reappointment, commencing on 15 January 2025, has been made in accordance with the Governance Code on Public Appointments.  A former UK Immigration Services Commissioner, Suzanne was also CEO of the Human Fertilisation and Embryology Authority and the first CEO of the Financial Services Compensation Scheme. During her central Whitehall career she worked at both HM Treasury and the Home Office, serving as private secretary to 2 Home Secretaries.  Her current non-executive director (NED) roles include:   Chair of the Fire Standards Board Chair Right to Succeed and Board Member Chair of the Audit Committee, College of Policing  "
